{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Assembly Committee on Privacy and Consumer Protection will focus on regulation of the Internet and social media companies.",
    "The Privacy Committee will address how to best protect consumer privacy in the digital age.",
    "The Privacy Committee will work on fairly regulating online commerce.",
    "The Privacy Committee will oversee social media companies.",
    "The Social Media Transparency and Accountability Act of 2021 aims to shed light on the role of social media in amplifying extreme and dangerous content.",
